<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Save Inventory Data"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/pipeline/inventory/{pipelineId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Save inventory data for a program

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"The ID of the pipeline to save the inventory data into","in":"path","name":"pipelineId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"active":{"type":"boolean"},"dataSourceId":{"type":"string"},"inventory":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"},"inventoryDate":{"type":"string"},"manualAdjustment":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"},"multiplier":{"type":"number","format":"double"},"notes":{"type":"string"},"planningUnitId":{"type":"string"},"realmCountryPlanningUnitId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"regionId":{"type":"string"}},"title":"QatTempInventory"}}},"description":"The inventory data to save","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Returns a success code"},"403":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"User does not have rights to save this inventory data"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Internal error while saving pipeline inventory data"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
